2605.17903.title: Agentic Chunking and Bayesian De-chunking of AI Generated Fuzzy Cognitive Maps: A Model of the Thucydides Trap
2605.17903.paper_summary: We automatically generate feedback causal fuzzy cognitive maps (FCMs) from text by teaching large-language-model agents to break the text into overlapping chunks of text. Convex mixing of these chunk FCMs gives a representative cyclic FCM knowledge graph. The text chunks can have different levels of overlap. The chunk FCMs still mix to form a new FCM causal knowledge graph. The mixing technique scales because it uses light computation with sparse causal chunk matrices. The mixing structure allows an operator-level type of Bayesian inference that produces "de-chunked" or posterior-like FCMs from the mixed FCM. These de-chunked FCMs are useful in their own right and allow further iterations of Bayesian updating. We demonstrate these mixing techniques on the essay text of Allison's "Thucydides Trap" model of conflict between a dominant power such as the United States and a rising power such as China. The FCM dynamical systems predict outcomes as they equilibrate to fixed-point or limit-cycle attractors. Seven out of 8 FCM knowledge graphs predicted a type of war when we stimulated them by turning on and keeping on the concept node that stands for the rising power's ambition and entitlement. Gemini 3.1 LLMs served as the chunking AI agents.
2605.17903.paper_summary_zh: 我們通過教導大型語言模型代理將文本分解為重疊的文本塊，自動生成反饋因果模糊認知圖（FCMs）。這些塊的FCMs的凸混合生成了一個代表性的循環FCM知識圖。文本塊可以具有不同程度的重疊。這些塊的FCMs仍然混合以形成一個新的FCM因果知識圖。這種混合技術具有可擴展性，因為它使用稀疏因果塊矩陣進行輕量計算。混合結構允許一種操作級別的貝葉斯推斷，從混合的FCM中生成“去塊”或類似後驗的FCMs。這些去塊的FCMs本身是有用的，並允許進一步的貝葉斯更新迭代。我們在艾莉森的“修昔底德陷阱”模型的論文文本上演示了這些混合技術，該模型描述了像美國這樣的主導力量與像中國這樣的崛起力量之間的衝突。FCM動態系統預測結果，因為它們平衡到固定點或極限週期吸引子。在我們通過啟動並保持代表崛起力量的野心和權利的概念節點來刺激它們時，8個FCM知識圖中有7個預測了一種戰爭。Gemini 3.1 LLMs作為塊化的AI代理。
2605.17903.author: Akash Kumar Panda et.al.
2605.17903.authors: Akash Kumar Panda, Olaoluwa Adigun, Bart Kosko
